Alan Franco.note: Ecuador's steady midfield balancer, useful for closing central gaps and keeping the next pass simple.
Alan Franco.noteZh: 阿兰·弗朗科是厄瓜多尔稳定的中场平衡点，能封住中路空当，并把下一脚传球处理得简洁。

Alan Minda.note: Ecuador's quick wide runner, able to attack tired full-backs and turn loose transitions into carries.
Alan Minda.noteZh: 阿兰·明达是厄瓜多尔速度型边路跑动点，能冲击疲劳的边后卫，并把松散转换变成带球推进。

Angelo Preciado.note: Ecuador's attacking right-back, giving them overlaps, recovery pace, and a real crossing lane from deep.
Angelo Preciado.noteZh: 安赫洛·普雷西亚多是厄瓜多尔进攻型右后卫，能提供套边、回追速度和来自深处的真实传中通道。

Anthony Valencia.note: Ecuador's mobile midfield option, useful for pressing support and carrying the ball through the first line.
Anthony Valencia.noteZh: 安东尼·瓦伦西亚是厄瓜多尔机动型中场选择，能支援压迫，并带球穿过第一道防线。

Denil Castillo.note: Ecuador's young holding midfielder, adding size, long passing, and protection in front of the centre-backs.
Denil Castillo.noteZh: 德尼尔·卡斯蒂略是厄瓜多尔年轻后腰，能增加身材、长传和中卫身前的保护。

Enner Valencia.note: Ecuador's captain and historic scorer, still the player they trust most to turn one clear chance into a goal.
Enner Valencia.noteZh: 恩纳·瓦伦西亚是厄瓜多尔队长和历史射手，依然是球队最信任、能把一次清晰机会转成进球的人。

Felix Torres.note: Ecuador's physical centre-back, important for aerial clearances, tight marking, and attacking set pieces.
Felix Torres.noteZh: 费利克斯·托雷斯是厄瓜多尔身体型中卫，对空中解围、紧密盯人和进攻定位球都很重要。

Gonzalo Plata.note: Ecuador's right-side creator, dangerous when he isolates a defender and cuts inside onto his stronger actions.
Gonzalo Plata.noteZh: 贡萨洛·普拉塔是厄瓜多尔右路创造者，在单挑防守人并内切做出强势动作时最有威胁。

Gonzalo Valle.note: Ecuador's goalkeeper cover, bringing domestic rhythm and a reliable shot-stopping option behind the starters.
Gonzalo Valle.noteZh: 贡萨洛·巴列是厄瓜多尔门将保障，带来本土比赛节奏，并在主力身后提供可靠扑救选择。

Hernan Galindez.note: Ecuador's veteran keeper, trusted for command, tournament calm, and saves when the back line bends.
Hernan Galindez.noteZh: 埃尔南·加林德斯是厄瓜多尔老练门将，在指挥、大赛冷静和防线承压时的扑救上值得信任。

Jackson Porozo.note: Ecuador's athletic centre-back depth, useful when they need size and recovery speed against direct forwards.
Jackson Porozo.noteZh: 杰克逊·波罗索是厄瓜多尔运动能力强的中卫深度，在面对直接型前锋时能提供身材和回追速度。

Jeremy Arevalo.note: Ecuador's young striker option, bringing pressing runs, penalty-box movement, and fresh energy off the bench.
Jeremy Arevalo.noteZh: 杰里米·阿雷瓦洛是厄瓜多尔年轻前锋选择，能带来压迫跑动、禁区走位和替补席上的新鲜活力。

Joel Ordonez.note: Ecuador's high-upside centre-back, giving them aerial power, calm defending, and passes that beat pressure.
Joel Ordonez.noteZh: 乔尔·奥多涅斯是厄瓜多尔高潜力中卫，能提供空中力量、冷静防守和穿透压力的传球。

John Yeboah.note: Ecuador's left-footed wide threat, useful for fast breaks, sharp changes of direction, and final-third invention.
John Yeboah.noteZh: 约翰·耶博阿是厄瓜多尔左脚边路威胁，适合快攻、突然变向和前场创造。

Jordy Alcivar.note: Ecuador's domestic midfield controller, helping with tackles, restarts, and a calmer rhythm when games get frantic.
Jordy Alcivar.noteZh: 约尔迪·阿尔西瓦尔是厄瓜多尔本土中场控制者，能在比赛变乱时提供抢断、定位球和更冷静的节奏。

Jordy Caicedo.note: Ecuador's physical striker alternative, useful for direct service, aerial duels, and late runs across defenders.
Jordy Caicedo.noteZh: 约尔迪·凯塞多是厄瓜多尔身体型中锋替代方案，适合直接传球、空中对抗和后段横向冲击后卫。

Kendry Paez.note: Ecuador's teenage creative wildcard, able to receive between lines and find a final pass before pressure arrives.
Kendry Paez.noteZh: 肯德里·派斯是厄瓜多尔年轻创造变数，能在线间接球，并在压力到来前找到最后一传。

Kevin Rodriguez.note: Ecuador's energetic forward runner, giving them pressing, channel attacks, and a direct route behind defenders.
Kevin Rodriguez.noteZh: 凯文·罗德里格斯是厄瓜多尔活力型前锋跑动点，能提供压迫、通道冲击和打到后卫身后的直接路线。

Moises Caicedo.note: Ecuador's midfield engine, built to win duels, escape pressure, and stop counters before they become dangerous.
Moises Caicedo.noteZh: 莫伊塞斯·凯塞多是厄瓜多尔中场发动机，擅长赢下对抗、摆脱压力，并在反击变危险前将其截停。

Moises Ramirez.note: Ecuador's younger goalkeeper option, useful for reaction saves, sweeper cover, and cleaner restart decisions.
Moises Ramirez.noteZh: 莫伊塞斯·拉米雷斯是厄瓜多尔较年轻的门将选择，能完成反应扑救、清道夫式覆盖和更干净的出球决策。

Nilson Angulo.note: Ecuador's acceleration winger, able to stress full-backs with direct carries and repeated one-on-ones.
Nilson Angulo.noteZh: 尼尔松·安古洛是厄瓜多尔加速型边锋，能用直接带球和反复一对一给边后卫施压。

Pedro Vite.note: Ecuador's clever attacking midfielder, linking short combinations and arriving late around the box.
Pedro Vite.noteZh: 佩德罗·维特是厄瓜多尔聪明的前腰，能串联短传配合，并后插上到禁区周围。

Pervis Estupinan.note: Ecuador's left-side outlet, stretching the flank with power runs and serving early balls into the area.
Pervis Estupinan.noteZh: 佩尔维斯·埃斯图皮尼安是厄瓜多尔左路出口，能用强力跑动拉开边路，并早早把球送入禁区。

Piero Hincapie.note: Ecuador's left-footed defensive leader, comfortable at centre-back or left-back and calm passing out.
Piero Hincapie.noteZh: 皮耶罗·因卡皮耶是厄瓜多尔左脚防线领袖，能踢中卫或左后卫，并冷静完成后场出球。

Willian Pacho.note: Ecuador's top-level centre-back, giving them recovery pace, aerial control, and confidence against elite forwards.
Willian Pacho.noteZh: 威廉·帕乔是厄瓜多尔顶级中卫，能提供回追速度、空中控制和面对精英前锋时的信心。

Yaimar Medina.note: Ecuador's young midfield spark, useful for carrying through space and speeding up attacks with quick passes.
Yaimar Medina.noteZh: 亚伊马尔·梅迪纳是厄瓜多尔年轻中场火花，能带球穿过空间，并用快速传球加快进攻。
